item.description:

19 Found this one myself lol
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @thecommoncolor does a lot of birds and other drawings and paintings. Check out their stuff on their posts!
27 Man Tax: Josh Holloway
I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: atadrisque

item.title: This made my day
item.description:
#shitpost
Good on the creator to tell these assholes to fuck right off. Idk what these people intended to do with a meme but I’m sure it can’t a serious or legit use of the artwork. I personally enjoy the stories of people who thought they could outsmart the crypto scammers, and then lost it all. Maybe that’s makes me a terrible person, laughing at peoples misfortunes, but in my defense they were warned by plenty of sources that crypto is not a sensible investment.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: This is my life now - dog, probably
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: New foster kittens!
item.description:
Got a text at lunch asking if I could take two four-week-old male kittens and we all know what I said! I ended up having a very productive trip to the humane society…
I got to see Stratus!!! He’s so big and fat! Jess is looking into whether or not her landlord will let her keep him, but I really hope so!
And mama Sky is as beautiful as always.
Bambi is still there which is a travesty but her perfect family will come along soon! And I got to give the humane society a check for $500 that @QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer raised for them with your help!! We can’t thank you enough for your generosity! Best community ever!! I’ll update once I get the two new kittens home!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: ICE targeting Military Families
item.description: Fp edit: you know, it is always fun to see these keyboard Warriors in the comments section. The ones that think that other than making videos spread awareness that is all people like we do. Right now because of peers from social media sites like tiktok there are large veteran movements in DC and other capitals happening right now. My question you all this would have you done to try to counter any of this? ICE just continues to get more evil. Source: https://youtu.be/7FcGGkeidDU Story https://www.coloradopolitics.com/2025/09/02/wife-of-fort-carson-soldier-gets-a-reprieve-from-deportation/

item.title: I resent bestie
item.description: I have been fostering for 12 years and have put my blood, sweat, and many tears into these kittens. I have put in the hours. And then bestie shows up on a lark and gets the newest foster kitten to purr like a maniac while the other one stares at me like I’ve done him wrong. Bestie IS the Black Cat Whisperer
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Salma Hayek celebrating her 59th birthday by drinking the blood of her Haters
item.description: The whole "Dusk til Dawn" vampire thing makes more sense to me every year
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1464 (world's end)
item.description:
Bread, I guess. Take it or leave it. I don't care anymore.
I wish to punish this body with pain, and hunger for its betrayal.
Fell asleep during orientation. Got fired.
I didn't even realize it had fallen asleep.
Something is wrong with me, I don't know what it is, its clearly worse than sleep apnea, and I won't be able to solve it because American Healthcare.
It would be cheaper for me to buy a gun and blow my brains out than to get the care I clearly need for whatever my stupid piece of cocksucking shit ass motherfucking body is doing to make me fall asleep when I sit still.
At least it doesn't usually (? I now wonder about the Jeep incident, if it wasn't just Pippin having chewed a hole in the CPAP hose) happen when I'm driving.
I'm discouraged, depressed, and angry, but only at myself, because somehow I did this to myself and I want to take a knife to my body and stab and slice and cut and burn it into pieces and ashes.
I am indeed, as my first ex fiancée said when I was 21, "absolutely useless and worthless"
I never did get unemployment for the jeep shit, or for the failed two weeks at the meadery
I can't do anything. Except maybe rescue Acorn Woodpeckers.
Driving to work today, saw a male Acorn Woodpecker flopping around on the side of the road, stopped, saw he was hurt (and pissed) and hopping, but not flying, so I scooped him up in a bird bander's grip and continued driving to work
But he escaped into the dashboard of my car when I stopped to get him into the bird carrier I still had in the car, and I didn't have time to retrieve him, so I cracked the windows and hoped for the best. Still heard him when we adjourned for lunch, but no sign of him.
When I started driving home after being fired, i saw he somehow had ended up in the back seat, so I got him into the carrier (more angry screaming) and hurried over to the Prescott Heritage Zoo, which has a bird rehabilitation center. This is where he was left, and I drove angrily back home over the mountain in silence, contemplating gun prices.
The fact is, the kind of man who would rescue an Acorn Woodpecker and seemingly has narcolepsy is not valued by capitalism.
This world is not getting better. Nor will it, without collapsing first, which will kill a lot of people who are the sort who would stop in a road to pick up an injured Woodpecker, because they don't have the money to buy a safehouse and a ticket through disaster.
What optimism is had is... gone. The only message I've been able to parse from the great tree is basically a complete and utter indifference to both humanity and time.
If I wasn't white, suicide by cop would probably be the way to go.
Hey, look, it's the Vimes Boot Theory being basically USED FOR ADVERTISEMENT. Because FUCKING LATE STAGE CAPITALISM.
Nobody cares enough to overthrow the government, but maybe if I pour gasoline on myself and light myself on fire in just the right place, I can be a speedbump for sales somewhere, maybe in downtown Phoenix
I mean, shit, if I do it before September is put, the fire will feel like air conditioning compared to the regular air, and I'll be comfortable.
There is no justice, no righteousness. I think the Gnostics were right: no loving God created this universe. And frankly, I can't wait to leave it.
But apparently, I *can't* because it would make the world a worse place. So I'm trapped here when really, I would rather die.
Whatever. I have only 3,000 to my name and no hope of a new job or healthcare or anything so I may as well write a will and see who I can find to care for Pippin when my bitter end comes by my hand in a month or two.
There's no point anymore. Hell, I may not even post after today's. Why bother? Well, I know why bother--so hopefully, nobody else feels as hopeless or miserable or sad as I do--but I don't know if that changes anything.
I don't know what to do. Other than, maybe, perhaps, lay down and die.
Spread my ashes at Pando, I guess, because I won't be getting an Orthodox funeral or burial--but that doesn't matter.
Don't worry. Nothing is going to happen today if it does end up happening. There is too much paperwork to do, and I want the state to get as little as possible from me.
Shut up, Anselm
This. This is what AI is doing to our brains.
Robocop: Art Historian would be interesting.
I'm a failure of a human and fail everything, and if I survive all this, I think another lesson is never do anything for yourself nice because the universe will immediately balance itself again by making bad things happen to me.
We all know these assholes who can function without coffee in the morning.
Hey, it's me. It's all worries. It's never *not* going to be worries ever again until after I die, *maybe*. And if there truly is a Samsara, it's going to be worries all over again. And again. And again. I feel like I would be the idiot who, in another life, if those were a thing, would have been idiotic enough to take a vow to be a Bhodisattva, and now I'm stuck in this hellhole forever. (And then i have to remind myself that I don't believe in past lives)
We all know one......
The person I wish I was.
I didn't die in my sleep last night. Which sucks.
Just birding things.
Yeah, but you know how corporate is.
Currently fleeing right now
Accurate conure energy.
Well, GOOD NEWS THEN! I also absolutely loathe myself! Just like I hate this universe. I hate that I hate it.
I feel like this is the result that would happen if fellow wierdo @xbadxfaeriex and I ever spent a drunk night together. Just... a brood of witches and wizards hatching from eggs, possibly destroying several small towns.
When cannon are canon.
I remember the first time I heard wood thrushes sing when I lived in Boston. But I like the songs of Hermit Thrushes more.
I guess there are worse phases. Parents keep calling. I'm too embarrassed to answer. Indeed, honestly, half of the reason why I would like to die right now is sheer embarrassment at being unable to function at all. I don't know if I'll give up yet. I want to, though. Badly.
Pippin tax. He would not leave me alone last night, kept opening his cage door to crawl over into bed and into my shirt. But anyway. Today's message from Pippin: "Okay. Thank you. Ta-da. What happened?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

As always I take no responsibility for the quality of the crops, I just Harvest them. And all sauce is Imgur.
